feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS for extract record from Purchase Condition records APP "Create Price Condition"
entry.content:
Hi all,

In our SAP Private Cloud, from the App "Create Price Condition" is possible to display the Condition Records. We need to have the CDSs for extract those records and to send them to Datasphere.

We found the CDS:  I_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD

in that CDS is it possible to see the records with the Condition Table selection but is not possible to select record throught the parameters: Company Code, Supplier and Material.

 

Have you any suggest for to do the selection mentioned?

Thank you

Daniele

entry.title: MRP relevant for scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to know whenever we create SA with MRP are SA created automatically and we dont receive anymore purchase requisitions..

If PR created in what cases it creates for SA.

entry.title: EDI CONNECTIONS TO SUPPLIER
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

How we implement EDI connections with supplier in sap public cloud and what all message type needed ..?

How would the process look like Any links are highly appreciated .

entry.title: Cummulative quantities for scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

how does the Cumulative work in scheduling agreement, which cumulatives we will have in SA, How does the system calculates them and make zero at end of the year.

entry.title: I want “Setup” and “Processing” and “Labor” in COOIS (SAP S/4HANA Public Edition)
entry.content:
Hi

 I would like to compare planned and actual hours for “setup”, “processing”, and “labor”.

 

In COOIS, “Set up” and “Processing” could be compared.

However, “Labor” is not comparable.
There was actual time for “Labor” but no planning time.

Which of the following applies in "column set"?

 

please tell me…

entry.title: SOAP WS-RM in CAP nod js project
entry.content:
I followed this SAP tutorial to consume a SOAP service from the Public Cloud (Consume SOAP Web Services in SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) | SAP Tutorials). The use case as defined in the tutorial is working 100%. I have updated the soap service to Proof Of Delivery (Overview | Proof of Delivery ‒ Update (B2B) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub). However, this service requires WS-RM to operate correctly. 

How do I configure WS-RM in a CAP project with a node.js backend? In PostMan, you can add the following header: 

    <soap:Header>
        <wsa:messageId>urn:uuid:{{$randomUUID}}</wsa:messageId>
    </soap:Header>
which solves the issue, but this is not working when adding it to node.js

entry.title: Manage Authorizations by via Business Roles for Customer & Supplier Business Partner Master Data
entry.content:
How to Manage Authorizations by via Business Roles for Customer and Supplier Business Partner Master Data in S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: User in People Picker of Manage workflow application
entry.content:
How to make users available in People picker of Manage workflow application?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchase order Quantity: Multiple of Fixed Amount
entry.content:
Hello there, SAP Community,

I’d like to configure Material master data for fixed purchase quantity.

I have a material that is sold in fixed multiples of 1000.

So, when I (Manually or MRP) create a purchase requisition/order, only multiples of 1000 are allowed as purchasable quantities. Also, the minimum purchasable quantity is 2000 units. So, if the MRP requires 1001 units, a purchase order for 2000 units will be created.

Allowed: 2000, 3000, 4000, ...

Not Allowed: e.g., 500, 1500, 1111 ... 

Where can I configure this behavior?

Can this also be controlled for manually created purchase requisitions and purchase orders?

Kind regards,
Philipp

entry.title: Cannot use alternate BOM 1
entry.content:
We have two alternate BOMs and Production Versions for a semi--finished material. When we select the first production version, it uses the second Production Version/BOM. When we select the second production version it also uses the second Production Version/BOM. 

Other odd things, the second BOM does not allow for entry of the Valid From date. When we add a component, it automatically fills in the current date and does not allow it to be changed. 

Things I have checked:

  • Both BOMs are active
  • No deletion flags are set
  • The production versions are linked to the correct alternate BOMs

System: Public Cloud

Any ideas what I am doing wrong?

entry.title: How to define which fields and which APP will be impacted in Multidimensional Data Grid Apps?
entry.content:
In What's New SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, there is a change regarding 

Show Non-Compound Key in Multidimensional Data Grid Apps

But how to define which fields and which APP will be impacted in Multidimensional Data Grid Apps?

entry.title: How to generate PIR with production version?
entry.content:
I would like to make a production plan using the production version in one material code.

I'm trying to plan using multiple cases at once rather than a single product code, can I add a production version field in Excel upload in the PIR maintenance app?

If you can upload the quantity required for Excel through the production version with an app other than the PIR maintenance app, please let me know the app name

thank you.

entry.title: will Deprecated scope items still be usable?
entry.content:
1. There are 3 scope items which have been declared Deprecated, but I could not find any further information about them. Will they still be usable after 2502 Release?

2. Whether deprecated scope items mentined in previous upgrade, while not in 2502, still be usable?

entry.title: Will Deprecated Extensibility Objects (CDS, DATA Elements, etc.) be still usable after 2502 Release?
entry.content:
System has many deprecated Extensibility Objects in use (like CDS, data elements, element in CDS)  not mentioned in 2502 Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD),  they are still be usable after this upgrade?

They'll be unusable only if SAP declares they will be deleted?

entry.title: Is the information in RASD updated real-timely?
entry.content: In RASD portal, information related to our system, like used object, is updated real-timely, or it's just the data at a certain time?

entry.title: Import Collection Dependency Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have 3SL Public Cloud system. In Q system, I discarded a collection which shouldn't be transported to P system.

Then I merged it with another collection. When I try to transport my new collection to P system, it gives below issue.

But as I said, It's already discarded. Why still check discarded collection with dependencies.

Now, this issue blocks my all custom logic and custom fields to move P system.

I try to make hot fix to move single object but still gives new errors by depending this discarded collection.

How can I solve this?

Thanks,

entry.title: Export data from app Display Credit Exposure
entry.content:
Is it possible to export data (cds view, odata service?) from the app Display Credit Exposure? We would like to have Credit exposure totals (open orders - 100 and open invoices - 200) in one table with Credit Exposure ( the business partner ID. credit segment etc.)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CREDIT NOTE DUE DATE - SAP PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION
entry.content:
A credit note without reference to the invoice is always due on the base date. According to OSS note 17410, by entering a 'V' in the Reference Document Number field, the due date is correctly calculated. We need to automatically configure this field during the posting process between the SD invoice and the FI invoice.

In previous releases, the SDVFX002 (or similar) enhancement was used, but in SAP Public Cloud, we are unable to locate where to make this adjustment.

Any suggestions?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Adding Value Help (additional annotations) to Generated CDS views
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP Community,

We are currently trying to create a report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

We followed these steps:

  1. Generate a custom CDS view using the "Custom CDS View" app.
  2. Create a query based on the CDS view in the "Custom Analytical Queries" app.
  3. Generate the report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app.

Everything works fine until one of our customers requested value help for certain fields.

As seen, we don’t have any value help for the Project ID.

Below my demo Custom CDS view just to show what I tried.

Is there any chance of adding value help to this report, or are there possible extension options?

I tried to copy the generated CDS query and add value help there. Obviously, it didn’t work because we are not allowed to use unreleased objects.

 

Thank you very much in advance,

Best regards,

Rufat

entry.title: Limitations in Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi!

I hope you're doing ! 

We are currently at a critical stage with the client, as most of their planning and capacity management is done through the CM25 and CM27 transactions in SAP R/3. We are concerned that the Public Cloud might have more limitations in terms of the capacity planning apps available, particularly with the Capacity Scheduling Board and Capacity Planning Table.

At this point, we are unsure whether the Live Cache will activate the required functionalities for these panels and tables. This uncertainty is a key concern for us as we need to ensure we can provide the necessary capabilities for the client moving forward.

We would appreciate any further insights or updates you can provide on this matter.

Best regards,
